name: Grilled Jamaican Jerk Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish or plastic bag, combine 3 tablespoons water and all ingredients except the chicken.
2. Add the chicken, coating it well with the marinade.
3. Cover the dish or seal the bag; marinate in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours or overnight.
4. Prepare an outdoor grill or preheat the broiler.
5. Remove the chicken from the marinade and discard any remaining liquid.
6. Pour the marinade into a small saucepan and bring to a boil.
7. Grill or broil the chicken for 15 to 20 minutes, turning occasionally and basting frequently with the marinade.
8. Serve hot. Makes 4 servings. Prep Time: about 5 minutes. Marinating Time: about 4 hours or longer. Cooking Time: about 15 minutes.
